word: G416 - ἀνεμίζω - anemízō - an-em-id'-zo - Drive with the wind

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνεμίζω

- Transliteration: Anemizo

- Phonetic: an-em-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to agitate or drive by the wind

- Origin: from G417

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G417; to toss with the wind: - drive with the wind.
